title: スプリンターズSの後に・頂点賭けて！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I won the Sprinters Stakes! I've conquered the
peak and am the best sprinter there is now!
Yeaaah! Go me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Everyone says this era belongs to Oguri Cap, but
Yaeno says she has a feeling I can change that
narrative.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I don't know about all that, but what I do know is that I want to be Oguri's rival!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So I march right over to Oguri and hand her a
written challenge! And you know what she says?
She's looking forward to racing me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Keep your eyes peeled, 'cause I'm gonna take the
title of the ultimate miler at the Mile
Championship!
